Patch Set 4:

I agree with Andreas. FWIW, I count almost 400 uses of the simple_strto*() functions in 4.19. And I do not see a non-deprecated replacement for the functionality they provide. So I do not really believe that these functions are going away. Moreover, the reason that these functions were deprecated was that the ignored overflow which is not an issue here.
